{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Dr. David prefers the fruit. He's been wondering if the flavor of cherries would be the same if they could grow to the size of apples.
|affct=FTH
|hard=ATK
|source=[[Value_Packs#Maneater_Value_Pack|Maneater Value Pack]]
|color=green
|earth=1
|water=1
|fire=2
|wind=2
|form=Angel
|element=Fire
|realm=Kemet
|orangehard=ATK
}}
